visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a low-angle shot panning up the silver metallic exterior of a building featuring a large "3COINS" logo under bright natural daylight. Sparkling star graphics are edited onto the frame. (2) The camera moves to a medium shot of the store's glass entrance where a large poster of Captain Pikachu is prominently displayed on the right. Pedestrians are briefly visible walking in the background and reflecting in the glass. (3) Inside the store, the camera focuses on large colorful cardboard cutouts of Pokemon characters, including Meowscarada and Pikachu in a captain's hat. A hand points towards the promotional signage. (4) A rapid sequence of close-up shots follows, showcasing various collaboration merchandise: a grey storage bin covered in Pokemon icons, individual packs of colorful stickers featuring different characters, and a beige makeup bag with an embroidered Captain Pikachu. (5) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt and multiple bracelets, is shown from the chest up holding a white tote bag with a Captain Pikachu illustration. She then demonstrates an eco-friendly shopping bag that folds into a small yellow Pikachu-shaped pouch. (6) The camera captures close-up details of other products like character slippers, clear PVC pouches, and a watch with a Captain Pikachu dial. The lighting remains bright and consistent with a retail studio environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: 3COINS. (2) [Subtitle]: 牠在2018年其實首度跟 Pokemon 合作. (3) [Subtitle]: 在今年再度推出全新. (4) [Subtitle]: 第2彈聯名系列了. (5) [Subtitle]: 你可以看到這次是. (6) [Subtitle]: 戴船長帽的 船長皮卡丘. (7) [Subtitle]: 它裡面有33種很多生活用品. (8) [Subtitle]: 有刺繡化妝包啊. (9) [Variety]: 容量超大. (10) [Subtitle]: PVC 透明包、馬克杯、托特包. (11) [Subtitle]: 手帕、拖鞋、徽章、貼紙罐. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且你仔細看. (13) [Subtitle]: Tim 嫂看上的這個. (14) [Subtitle]: 環保袋. (15) [Variety]: 瞬間賣光!. (16) [Subtitle]: 真的好搶手. (17) [Subtitle]: 大家有去 3COINS. (18) [Variety]: 可以去看看!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female presenter inside the store, 1 male hand pointing, and 2-3 shoppers visible as passers-by or in reflections.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair, wearing a casual white t-shirt and several bracelets on her right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts at the modern silver facade of a building and transitions into the interior of a 3COINS retail store, characterized by bright white shelves, colorful Pokemon-themed displays, and organized merchandise sections.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-tempo, energetic electronic BGM track. A male narrator begins speaking in a friendly, enthusiastic tone about the 3COINS store. (2) A sharp "whoosh" transition SFX occurs as the narrator mentions the 2018 Pokémon collaboration, with his voice maintaining high arousal. (3) A brief female voice interjects excitedly saying "容量超大!" (Huge capacity!) as a bag is shown, accompanied by a subtle fabric rustle. (4) The narrator continues listing items like slippers and mugs over a driving drum beat. Multiple "pop" sound effects punctuate the visual cuts of different merchandise. (5) Light rustling of plastic bags is heard as the woman folds the eco-bag. The BGM remains consistent in tempo and major key. (6) A final playful "ding" sound effect signals the end of the video as the narrator gives a call to action for viewers to visit the store.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Thematic Showcase -> Detailed Item List -> Highlight Item -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to promote a new limited-edition collaboration between the retail brand 3COINS and Pokémon. It uses high-energy narration and fast-paced editing to showcase a wide variety of affordable lifestyle goods, appealing to fans of the franchise and budget-conscious shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the store, highlighting of specific product features (capacity), and a final verbal call to action to visit the location.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social media short that leverages popular IP (Pokémon) and retail trends to drive store traffic.
